{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/60645159?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/AdmirBajric", "id": 60645159, "login": "AdmirBajric", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYwNjQ1MTU5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/AdmirBajric", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44459", "cvss": {"score": 3.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1284", "name": "Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input"}], "description": "### Summary

Improper validation of the JWT NumericDate claims `exp`, `nbf`, and `iat` in `hono/utils/jwt` allows tokens with non-spec-compliant claim values to silently bypass time-based checks. This issue is not exploitable by an anonymous attacker; it only manifests when a malformed claim value reaches `verify()` — typically when the application itself issues such tokens, or when the signing key is otherwise under attacker control.

### Details

The validation routine combined option, presence, and threshold checks in a single short-circuiting expression, so several classes of malformed values were silently skipped instead of rejected:

- A falsy numeric value short-circuited the presence check.
- A non-finite numeric value compared as never-after-now and never-expired.
- A non-numeric type produced NaN comparisons that evaluated false.

This deviates from RFC 7519 §4.1.4, which defines NumericDate as a finite JSON numeric value.

### Impact

An actor able to issue tokens accepted by the application may craft tokens whose `exp`, `nbf`, or `iat` claims silently bypass time-based enforcement. This may lead to:

- Tokens treated as never expiring even with `exp` configured on the verifier.
- Tokens with a future `nbf` accepted as currently valid.
- Tokens with a future `iat` accepted as legitimately issued.

Deployments using a well-formed token issuer and protecting the signing key are not affected.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00216, "percentile": 0.11851}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-09T00:45:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44459"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T16:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-05-09T00:45:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44459", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "Hono has improper validation of NumericDate claims (exp, nbf, iat) in JWT verify()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:35:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hm8q-7f3q-5f36", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hono has improper validation of NumericDate claims (exp, nbf, iat) in JWT verify()
